title: Sparkle with Bardins Jewellers
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Putting the sparkle in your...
bodyText:
Advertorial

BUSINESS NEWS - Putting the sparkle in your staycation, Bardins Jewellers ensure you'll shine in their expertly crafted custom jewellery.


> Whether you're lounging in luxury, dining out or spending time with friends and family, Bardins Jewellers have your dream jewellery piece, no matter the occasion, waiting to be discovered at their premier jewellery store, based at the Langeberg Mall.


Running late or missed a date? Bardins have a host of exquisite watches that will help you avoid another staycation time-keeping blunder, as well as the perfect apology gift, if needed.

Established in 1903, and one of the oldest jewellers in the country, Bardins Jewellers have spent the past three decades crafting and creating masterpieces from their base at the Heiderand Mall, moving this year to the Langeberg Mall in Voorbaai, Mossel Bay.

Now at Shop 27, Langeberg Mall, Bardins Jewellers, leading experts in custom jewellery, are ready to make you your very own bespoke treasure.

With their experienced and highly skilled team of goldsmiths and designers, Bardins turn each of their customer's visions into reality.

And with over a century in perfecting their craft and services, it's no wonder Bardins Jewellers were voted the Best Jeweller and Best Jewellery Store in Mossel Bay in the Best of Mossel Bay Awards 2024.

In addition to guaranteeing their clients are always beautifully bejewelled, Bardins also offer a list of comprehensive services which includes valuations, repairs and watch servicing, while ensuring your treasures remain pristine.

The store's continued success over 121 years since its inception is owing to Bardins' ceaseless innovation and personalised service.

Guaranteeing reliable, quality and quick service through inhouse workshop and maintaining solid relationships with both clients and suppliers are of the utmost importance to Bardins.

Also at the heart of Bardins' success is the jewellers' constant embracing of new trends, adapting to market changes and helping clients make magical memories of all kinds with their masterpieces.

Flourishing under the ownership and management of Mark and Giovanna Furness, Bardins Jewellers are not just a premier store and business but are entrenched in the community, ensuring the needs of their clients are always met to perfection.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
